---
title: "Bluesky"
platform_slug: "bluesky"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/bluesky/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/bluesky/ugc.yml
    UK: data/global/bluesky/ugc.yml
---

Bluesky's transparency is assessed through the [AT Protocol API](https://docs.bsky.app/) for user-generated content as a single global resource. The platform does not operate an advertising-based business model and was therefore not evaluated under the advertising framework. Its open architecture supports strong transparency in UGC data access, with key strengths including comprehensive endpoint coverage for extracting posts and author feeds, minimal authentication barriers, and consistent, high-performance data retrieval. The API provides documented response schemas and clear rate limit specifications. However, important limitations remain: documentation is available only in English and is often sparse, with some endpoints lacking detailed explanations, and there are no specific terms governing API use. Functional gaps include the absence of a graphical interface for data access and the lack of location-based filtering capabilities. In addition, while the platform enables user self-labeling, it does not provide dedicated labels for AI-generated content, hindering its identification. These constraints may limit certain research applications and oversight efforts, particularly for non-technical stakeholders.

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("bluesky")
```



## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="bluesky",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="bluesky",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```
